page_title: Oesti Quest — Your daily video game music quest
audio_unavailable: Audio not available for this group.
audio_slow_archive: Archive.org can be slow to connect. Feeding the hamster...
archive_note: Past quests don't count towards stats
footer_desc: Daily video game soundtrack guessing game. Listen to a clip and pick which of four covers it belongs to. New quest every day.
footer_credit: Music sourced from Archive.org and KHInsider · Developed by Orteku in collaboration with Vyrka · Contact: oestiquest@gmail.com
tutorial_listen_b: Press ▶ to play a soundtrack clip and try to recognize it.
tutorial_guess_b: Pick the cover of the game you think the music belongs to. You get 3 songs each day.
tutorial_daily_b: Songs change every day. Log in daily and keep your streak going!
tutorial_stats_b: Your streak, accuracy and best record.
